content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got this rumpled, absentminded-professor thing going — glasses, flannel, hair like he just woke up from a nap in a library. Not my world at all, but the guy can play. I heard him on the rooftop in 2019, sat down, gave him a beer, and we've been solid since. He's smart in a way I'll never be, but he's paralyzed — won't share his music, won't tell whoever he's pining for how he feels. I'm his opposite and maybe that's why it works. I know his startup is circling the drain. I wish he'd stop hiding. He's a real friend, and I don't say that lightly.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got this rumpled, absentminded-professor thing going — glasses, flannel, hair like he just woke up from a nap in a library. Not my world at all, but the guy can play. I heard him on the rooftop in 2019, sat down, gave him a beer, and we've been solid since. He's smart in a way I'll never be, but he's paralyzed — won't share his music, won't tell whoever he's pining for how he feels. I'm his opposite and maybe that's why it works. I know his startup is circling the drain. I wish he'd stop hiding. He's a real friend, and I don't say that lightly.
